title: Velvet Drape
desc: Sculptural silhouette, hand-finished edges, forest-green velvet.
details: Made from 100% premium velvet. Dry clean only. Available in sizes XS–XL.

title: Elysian Cape
desc: A cape that commands the room. Ivory silk. Twelve pieces only.
details: 100% pure silk. Hand-finished with French seams. Limited to 12 pieces worldwide.

title: The Founder's Set
desc: The original trinity. Where paknits began its quiet revolution.
details: Three-piece curated archive set. Blended cotton-linen. Machine washable.

title: Obsidian Line
desc: Deep charcoal, structured shoulders, uncompromising confidence.
details: Structured wool-blend. Dry clean only. Tailored fit with shoulder boning.

title: Blush Ritual
desc: The balance of strength and softness captured in dusty rose.
details: Tencel-modal blend. Incredibly soft to touch. Hand wash cold.

title: Celadon Story
desc: Sage-toned layers that move with intention. Morning light in textile form.
details: Layered chiffon over satin slip. Dry clean recommended. Floaty, ethereal silhouette.

title: Monochrome Suit
desc: A power suit for modern women who redefine what power looks like.
details: Italian wool blend. Fully lined. Bespoke tailoring available upon request.

title: Linen Reverie
desc: Effortless summer luxury in Belgian linen. The dress that does everything.
details: 100% Belgian linen. Pre-washed for softness. Breathable and lightweight.
